title: Poch Experience
body:
## ![Poch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169509b0c40970a4599678a94323fbf3a7471342.jpeg)

A lightweight client-side modpack that enhances your Minecraft experience **without compromising its vanilla essence.**

Carefully selected quality-of-life tweaks, performance optimizations, and OptiFine alternatives come together to create a smooth, immersive, and modern experience — all while keeping things simple and fast.

This pack improves atmosphere, visuals, usability, and social interaction — without the bloat.

# ⠀What's included?

### ⠀**Mods**

And want their game to feel it all._
